user_query: can we please update the live updates to a streaming channel?
final_answer_preview:
Great question. A couple of quick clarifications before I make any changes:

- By “streaming channel,” do you want Live Updates to become a live video feed (e.g., publicly viewable) and/or restrict it to internal viewers?
- Do you want to change the channel’s visibility (public/private/corporate) as part of this, or keep it as-is and just add streaming?
- Do you have a streaming source to connect
